stakeholders.Role: Regulates public transport operators and oversees licensing compliance for all rail and bus services.

Source metadata.evidence_original: 土地交通局（LTA）与新加坡科技公司合作开发无人驾驶巴士项目，但该公司反映测试场地审批流程过长，严重延误了研发进度。
Source metadata.evidence_translated: Land Transport Authority (LTA) collaborates with Singapore technology companies to develop autonomous bus projects, but the company reports that the test site approval process is too long, severely delaying research and development progress.

stakeholders.Role: Leads the Smart Urban Mobility Reform 2027 and funds pilot projects for autonomous buses.

Source metadata.evidence_original: The Land Transport Authority (LTA) leads the Smart Urban Mobility Reform 2027.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: The Land Transport Authority (LTA) leads the Smart Urban Mobility Reform 2027.

stakeholders.Role: Operates major MRT lines under license from LTA.

Source metadata.evidence_original: SMRT Corporation operates major MRT lines under license from LTA.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: SMRT Corporation operates major MRT lines under license from LTA.

stakeholders.Role: Partners with SMRT to integrate digital ticketing systems across rail and bus networks.

Source metadata.evidence_original: SMRT partners with SBS Transit to integrate digital ticketing systems across rail and bus networks.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: SMRT partners with SBS Transit to integrate digital ticketing systems across rail and bus networks.

stakeholders.Role: Competes with private mobility providers for commuter market share.

Source metadata.evidence_original: SMRT competes with private mobility providers for commuter market share.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: SMRT competes with private mobility providers for commuter market share.

stakeholders.Role: Collaborates with LTA on first-mile/last-mile pilot programs.

Source metadata.evidence_original: Grab Singapore collaborates with LTA on first-mile/last-mile pilot programs but has raised concerns about regulatory constraints on surge pricing.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: Grab Singapore collaborates with LTA on first-mile/last-mile pilot programs but has raised concerns about regulatory constraints on surge pricing.

stakeholders.Role: Competes with Gojek Singapore for ride-hailing customers.

Source metadata.evidence_original: Grab competes with Gojek Singapore for ride-hailing customers.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: Grab competes with Gojek Singapore for ride-hailing customers.

stakeholders.Role: Works with LTA to enforce vehicle emissions standards and penalizes non-compliant fleet operators.

Source metadata.evidence_original: The National Environment Agency (NEA) works with LTA to enforce vehicle emissions standards and penalizes non-compliant fleet operators.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: The National Environment Agency (NEA) works with LTA to enforce vehicle emissions standards and penalizes non-compliant fleet operators.

stakeholders.Role: Coordinate with LTA on infrastructure upgrades around MRT stations and pedestrian pathways.

Source metadata.evidence_original: Town Councils coordinate with LTA on infrastructure upgrades around MRT stations and pedestrian pathways.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: Town Councils coordinate with LTA on infrastructure upgrades around MRT stations and pedestrian pathways.

stakeholders.Role: Advocates for passenger rights and submits policy feedback to MOT.

Source metadata.evidence_original: Commuters’ Association of Singapore (CAS) advocates for passenger rights and submits policy feedback to MOT.
Source metadata.evidence_translated: Commuters’ Association of Singapore (CAS) advocates for passenger rights and submits policy feedback to MOT.
